creator: webmaster@kibab.com
text:
On 17.10.12 07:56, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/php5-thrift,
>
> Please note that PR ports/172808 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/172808
>
I appove this patch, tested on Redports.
Please commit it.
 

// Ilya
